text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Aw, so close! You almost had it!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
You're getting there, but you've got a long way
to go before you're at my level! ♪

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Ahaha. Well, at least you looked cool trying so
hard.
